# SGLang reward-serving env — used by `start_servers_A.sh` to host the SDG
# bbox detector and the UnifiedReward-2.0 scalar scorer over HTTP.
# Heavy CUDA stack; isolated from training so vllm/sglang versions don't drift.

sglang[all]==0.3.6
vllm==0.6.4

# Qwen3-VL inference deps
transformers==4.46.3
qwen-vl-utils==0.0.10

# core
torch==2.4.0
Pillow==10.4.0
numpy==1.26.4
